aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The universe offers no guidance. Neither does your runbook.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for you today. Your Slack is not. It was never quiet. It will never be quiet.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Stillness is sacred. Let the pipeline run. Just this once.
taurus.prophecy: The stars suggest rest. You have been 'resting' on this refactor for three sprints.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — One of you wants to deploy. The other wants to rewrite it first. Classic.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. You will fill that silence with three competing opinions about tab width.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Trust your gut. Your gut has been right about prod deployments exactly twice.
cancer.prophecy: The universe is still. You have already filed a ticket titled 'something feels off' with no description.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — You were going to deploy loudly regardless. The cosmos have accepted this.
leo.prophecy: The stars are quiet today. You will not be. You will paste your PR link in four different channels.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — You've reviewed the diff seventeen times. Ship it. Let go.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos offer silence today. You will interpret this as time to audit the entire codebase for inconsistent spacing.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You've been deciding since the last standup. The decision is now the blocker.
libra.prophecy: The stars are balanced today. You have opened twelve browser tabs and closed none.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — The quiet is a trap. Scorpio knows. Do not deploy.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are suspiciously silent today. You have already checked the logs twice. You are going back in.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — You already pushed to main. This is a retrospective.
sagittarius.prophecy: The universe says slow down. You have seven open tabs, two side projects, and a new tech stack. The universe can wait.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Capricorn does not wait for the universe's permission.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You have already shipped two features, written documentation, and updated the changelog. It is 9 AM.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You've proposed three alternative deployment strategies. None of them are ready.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars are quiet. You will use this time to pitch a complete infrastructure overhaul in the team chat.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Something in the silence says not today. You felt it. Respect it.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. You will absorb the energy of six other people's crises and call it empathy.
